headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway Has Held DaVita Inc. (DVA) Since 2011
summary: DaVita Inc. (NYSE:DVA) is one of the 10 Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. DaVita Inc. headline: DaVita Stock Benefits From Strengthening Kidney Care Delivery
